_provenance.notes: Descriptive sidecar for the current state of https://www.hirslanden.ch/ (home only). extensions block carries componentStyle, motifs, voice, systemComponents, scaleAudit that the Stitch frontmatter cannot hold.

display.purpose: Hero watermark headline only (uppercase, light taupe over photo).

label.purpose: Dense meta — clinic names, dates, eyebrow tags.

shadows.name: card-float
shadows.purpose: The single elevation: white cards floated over the warm-white ground. Value approximate.

borderRadius.note: 18px pill chips contrast deliberately with squared (0px) primary buttons and cards; 50% circles for carousel dots.

motifs.photography: Human, in-conversation clinician-and-patient imagery in bright Swiss interiors with lake/mountain views; served WebP/JPG from the Mediclinic Scene7 DAM.

iconFont.note: Declared @font-face icon font, fetched. Glyph->codepoint table not enumerable under single-page capture; hybrid with inline SVG.

voice.firstParagraph: Die Hirslanden-Gruppe ist in der ganzen Schweiz zu Hause. Sie finden eine unserer Kliniken vom Bodensee im Osten über Zürich, die Zentralschweiz, Basel und Bern bis ganz im Westen am Genfersee.

scaleAudit.note: 42/34=1.235, 34/22=1.545 — ratios disagree; not a single modular scale.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Square blue action button — search, locate, read-on.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0094d4; color: #fff; padding: 12px 28px; border: none; border-radius: 0; font-family: 'Metropolis', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 15px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.18s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #007bb3; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0094d4; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Quick-link Chip
components.description: Warm-white pill wayfinding chip under the search box.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; background: #f7f7f6; color: #534c46; padding: 8px 18px; border-radius: 18px; font-family: 'Metropolis', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.18s; } .ds-chip:hover { background: #efeeec; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: White teaser/news card floated over the warm ground.
components.html:
Babygalerie

Begrüssen Sie die Neugeborenen aus unseren Geburtskliniken in der Schweiz.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 0; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); font-family: 'Metropolis', sans-serif; color: #534c46; } .ds-card h3 { font-weight: 700; font-size: 22px; line-height: 1.36; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card p { font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.63; margin: 0; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); }

components.name: Search Field
components.description: Hero search field paired with the blue search button.
components.css: .ds-search { display: flex; background: #fff; border-radius: 18px; padding: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .ds-search-input { flex: 1; border: 1px solid #e2dfdb; border-radius: 0; padding: 14px 16px; font-family: 'Metropolis', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; color: #534c46; } .ds-search-input:focus { outline: 2px solid #0094d4; } .ds-search-btn { background: #0094d4; color: #fff; border: none; padding: 14px 28px; font-family: 'Metropolis', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; }

components.name: CTA Band
components.css: .ds-cta-band { background: #0094d4; color: #fff; padding: 48px 24px; text-align: center; font-family: 'Metropolis', sans-serif; } .ds-cta-band h2 { font-weight: 700; font-size: 34px; margin: 0 0 16px; } .ds-cta-band-btn { background: #fff; color: #0094d4; border: none; padding: 12px 28px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; } .ds-cta-band-btn:hover { background: #f0efed; }

narrative.overview: The visual system of a private-hospital group that wants a worried visitor to exhale: restrained, warm, institutional — the opposite of cold clinical-tech. A warm off-white ground and warm taupe-grey text (never pure black on sterile white), a single calm Hirslanden Blue for all action, one geometric sans (Metropolis) for everything, and human clinician-and-patient photography. It rejects the marketing funnel (the hero is a search box, not a shouty CTA) and rejects decoration (no gradients, no glassmorphism, one soft shadow). Color is rationed so the emergency red on '144' is unmissable.
keyCharacteristics: Warm-neutral foundation (warm-white grounds, taupe-grey text), never cold black-on-white.
One accent (Hirslanden blue) for all action; one type family (Metropolis) for everything.
Soft single-elevation cards over a warm ground; no decorative effects.
Rationed saturation: emergency red is the only competing color, reserved for the 144 number.

rules.name: The One Blue Rule
rules.body: There is exactly one accent: Hirslanden Blue. It carries all action and emphasis; nothing else reads as clickable-important except the emergency number.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: Never pure black on pure white for content. Text is warm taupe-grey (#534c46); grounds are warm off-white (#f7f6f5).

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Metropolis carries every register. No display/body pairing, no second typeface; distinction comes from weight and size.

rules.name: The Single-Shadow Rule
rules.body: There is one elevation: white cards floated on a single soft shadow over the warm ground. No second, deeper tier.

dos: Do keep the warm neutral foundation: warm-white grounds (#f7f6f5), warm taupe-grey text (#534c46).
Do use exactly one accent — Hirslanden Blue (#0094d4) — for all action and emphasis.
Do set everything in Metropolis; vary weight (400/500/700) and size, not family.
Do lead the hero with a search affordance and quick-link pills.
Do reserve emergency red (#f43a11) for the 144 emergency number and nothing else.
Do float white cards over the warm ground with the single soft shadow (0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)).
Do use human, in-conversation clinician-and-patient photography in bright Swiss interiors.
donts: Don't use pure black on sterile pure white for content — that is the cold clinical-tech look this brand rejects.
Don't add gradients, glassmorphism, neon, or heavy/layered drop shadows.
Don't introduce a second typeface or display font for flavour.
Don't turn the hero into an aggressive marketing funnel (countdowns, popups, single shouty CTA).
Don't spend the accent blue on decoration; if everything is blue, nothing is the action.
Don't let the emergency-red leak onto non-emergency elements.
